name: Santa Fe Grilled Turkey
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Boned turkey breast half, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the turkey between 2 sheets of heavy-duty plastic wrap and flatten to a thickness of 2 inches using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
2. Make several diagonal cuts, each 1/4 inch deep, on one side of the turkey in a diamond pattern.
3. Sprinkle both sides with salt and pepper.
4. Place the turkey in a shallow baking dish.
5. Combine lime juice and olive oil; pour over the turkey, turning to coat.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours, turning occasionally.
7. Combine diced plum tomatoes, chopped onion, minced cilantro, minced jalapeno pepper, and red wine vinegar; cover and chill.
8. Coat the grill rack with cooking spray and place it on the grill over medium-hot coals.
9. Place the turkey on the rack, reserving the marinade.
10. Cook for 7 minutes on each side or until done, brushing occasionally with the reserved marinade.
11. Cut the turkey into thin slices.
12. Serve with salsa. Makes 4 servings.
Nutritional information per serving: calories - 181, protein - 26.5 g., fat - 4.9 g., carbohydrates - 7.3 g., cholesterol - 59 mg., sodium - 175 mg.
